zh.lifeSummary: 當Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode於1230年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德布雷德盧德時，他的父親Dirk I van Brederode50歲，母親Aleidis van Heusden40歲。他於1255年與Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1266年在荷蘭霍蘭斯文惠被列為ambachtsheer。他去世於1306年在荷蘭努-拉藍德維爾森享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode于1230年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德布雷德盧德时，他的父亲Dirk I van Brederode50岁，母亲Aleidis van Heusden40岁。他于1255年与Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1266年在荷兰霍蘭斯文惠被列为ambachtsheer。他去世于1306年在荷兰努-拉藍德維爾森享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

(iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode was born in 1230, in Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Dirk I van Brederode, was 50 and his mother, Aleidis van Heusden, was 40. He married Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk in 1255. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. In 1266, his occupation is listed as ambachtsheer in Zevenhuizen, Holland, Netherlands. He died in 1306, in Velsen, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode est né en 1230, à Brederode, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk I van Brederode, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Heusden, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk en 1255. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. En 1266, sa profession de son indiquée est ambachtsheer à Zevenhuizen, Holland, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé en 1306, à Velsen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode 1230 in Brederode, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dirk I van Brederode 50 und seine Mutter Aleidis van Heusden 40. Er hat 1255 Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1266 ist sein Beruf als ambachtsheer in Zevenhuizen, Holland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb 1306 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Velsen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande.

it.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode è nato il nel 1230 nel Brederode, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dirk I van Brederode, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Aleidis van Heusden, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk nel 1255. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Nel 1266, la sua occupazione è indicata come ambachtsheer nel Zevenhuizen, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì nel 1306, nel Velsen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Floris van Doortoghe van Brederodeが1230年にオランダノオルド-hオランドブレデロドで生まれた時，父Dirk I van Brederodeは50歳，母Aleidis van Heusdenは40歳であった。1255年にBeatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。1266年，オランダホーランドゼベンハイズンでの職業はambachtsheerと記録されている。彼は1306年にオランダノオルド-hオランドベルセンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode(이)가 1230년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 브레더드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dirk I van Brederode(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Aleidis van Heusden(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1255년 Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1266년, 그의 직업은 네덜란드 홀랜드 즈에븐후이즌에서 ambachtsheer이었다. 그는 1306년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 벨센에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode nasceu em 1230, em Brederode, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dirk I van Brederode, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis van Heusden, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk em 1255. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Em 1266, sua profissão aparece como ambachtsheer em Zevenhuizen, Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 1306, em Velsen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode родился в 1230 г. в местности бредирод, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dirk I van Brederode было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Heusden, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk в 1255 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1266 году он работал по профессии ambachtsheer в местности зивенуизен, холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер в 1306 г. в местности велсен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 76 лет.

sm.From 1266 to 1293: mai le 1266 e o'o I le 1293

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode nació en 1230, en Brederode, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dirk I van Brederode, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Aleidis van Heusden, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk en 1255. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. En 1266, su ocupación registrada era ambachtsheer en Zevenhuizen, Holland, Países Bajos. Murió en 1306, en Velsen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 76 años.
